role: Deputy for Internal Security, Supreme National Security Council (d. 17 March 2026)
bio: Alireza Bayat served as Deputy for Internal Security at the [Supreme National Security Council](/orgs/supreme-national-security-council). He was killed on 17 March 2026 in the same Israeli airstrike that killed [Ali Larijani](/people/ali-larijani), as part of the [March 2026 Strike Wave](/events/march-2026-strike-wave). The SNSC strike also killed [Morteza Larijani](/people/morteza-larijani) and [Ali Bateni](/people/ali-bateni).

sources.title: Iran's wartime leader isn't a dealmaker

editorial_notes: Killed 17 March 2026 in the Larijani strike. SNSC Deputy for Internal Security.
